items.label: patch:app
items.path: cd apps/app && git add * && git commit -m "Cleaning w/ push" && git push && pnpm version patch && git push && git push --tags && cd ../..

items.label: db:app
items.path: cd apps/app && pnpm run db:all && cd ../..

items.label: clean:app
items.path: cd apps/app && foreach ($path in @('.cache', 'build', 'node_modules', 'pnpm-lock.yaml', 'public\build' )) { if (Test-Path $path) { Remove-Item -Path $path -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } && cd ../..

items.label: DEVSTACK: Generate pkg.json cmds for quickpick menu items
DEVSTACK: Generate icon library items for devstack functions
PkgJson+ → MDPP+ → CVSIX+ → INS
items.tooltipText: Build pkg.json → md pre-processer → build custom vsix → install

items.label: Order 1
items.tooltipText: saveAll → pkg.dev.json → pkg.jsn → MD Pre-Proc → compile → +cvsix → install → R

items.label: Order 2
items.tooltipText: order 1 → autorun

items.label: Order 3
items.tooltipText: order 2 → updates all

items.label: Order 4
items.tooltipText: order 2 → bump patch → build all projects → send vsix to marketplace

items.label: Order 5
items.tooltipText: bum patch → md pre-processor → convert pkg.json → compile and archive → send vsix to marketplace

items.label: Order 6
items.tooltipText: order 1 → autorun

items.label: Order 7
items.tooltipText: order 1 → autorun

items.label: Order 8
items.tooltipText: order 1 → autorun

items.label: Order 9
items.tooltipText: order 1 → autorun

items.label: Order 10
items.tooltipText: order 1 → autorun

items.label: Order 11
items.tooltipText: compile → archive → push and patch → install vsix → push via rest api → save → reload window
